## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's approach to AI/LLM optimization and discuss strategies for client communication and implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is actively developing strategies for AI/LLM optimization, including tracking prompts and analyzing content performance](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [There's a need to create client-facing resources (e.g., one-pagers) to explain GrowthX's AI/LLM approach and its value](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Integrating AI/LLM insights into content strategy is ongoing, with a focus on listicles, comparisons, and FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Measuring the impact of AI/LLM optimization remains challenging, requiring a multi-faceted approach beyond just referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

## Topics

### AI/LLM Optimization Strategies

  - [Developed a prompt generator to help create effective prompts based on client artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Organized Q\&A into a more digestible format for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Focusing on long-tail queries and content freshness to align with AI/LLM tendencies](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Considering adoption of LLMs.TXT file for crawler education on products](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

  - [Planning to create one-pagers on topics like site audits and on-page recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

  - [Considering hiring a data scientist to develop more sophisticated analysis methods](https://fathom.video/share/hxr9YkZq4ERx18C2yxZzizzAvfzSYnjW?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
